name: rain-ai
description: A shareable Claude marketplace for getting set up: onboarding, system orientation, and device bootstrapping. The front door to a Claude-as-an-OS workflow.

plugins.name: start
plugins.description: System onboarding and device setup: orientation to the harness and marketplace, a mental model of Claude-as-an-OS, and global/device bootstrapping (terminal, shared Claude settings). Per-capability setup stays in each capability's own plugin.
